astdump.name: import_url_plain
import_url_parameter
dashql_viz_position
astdump.input: VIZ weather_avg USING LINE ( position = ( row = 0, column = 0, width = 4, height = 15 ) )

astdump.name: dashql_viz_position_short
dashql_declare_calendar_date
astdump.input: DECLARE foo AS DATE USING CALENDAR; VIZ (SELECT foo) USING TABLE;

astdump.name: dashql_declare_calendar_date_range
astdump.input: DECLARE foo AS DATE[2] USING CALENDAR; VIZ (SELECT foo[0], foo[1]) USING TABLE;
